trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all three bullish signals aligned — RSI 67.0 in momentum zone, MACD crossover, and histogram rising — UiPath is an AI automation leader at a low unit price that lets us fully deploy remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back modestly today (-0.7% across NASDAQ and S&P 500), a mild neutral day that doesn't signal broader risk-off conditions. With 4 open slots and $743 in idle cash exceeding the $500 threshold, deploying into the best screened candidate is the right call. PATH leads with a score-95 clean sweep of momentum signals, and the AI automation space continues to show relative strength.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets saw a broad but shallow pullback of 0.7% on both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ, consistent with routine profit-taking or consolidation after a recent rally phase. No single sector drove the decline — the uniform drop across indices suggests macro repositioning rather than a fundamental catalyst. With RSI and MACD readings still bullish on high-scoring screened names, the pullback is more likely a pause than a trend reversal.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日小幅回落，標普500與那斯達克均下跌0.7%，走勢屬於技術性整理，並非由單一板塊主導，反映宏觀資金的短暫調倉。值得注意的是，多隻評分95的精選股票RSI與MACD指標依然保持多頭格局，顯示本次回調更像是強勢整理，而非趨勢反轉。在此背景下，逢低佈局動能強勁的優質個股仍屬合理策略。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already moving in the right direction, on the theory that trends tend to continue. Key signals include RSI in the 55–70 range (strong but not overbought), MACD crossovers, and price above the 20-day moving average — exactly what today's top candidates show. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is why the stop-loss rule at -7% acts as a safety net.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略的核心是「追強不追弱」——買入已在上升趨勢中的股票，因為趨勢一旦形成往往具有慣性。常用指標包括RSI處於55至70的多頭區間（強勢但未超買）、MACD金叉，以及股價在20日均線之上，這正是今日評分最高候選股的共同特徵。動能策略的風險在於趨勢可能急速反轉，因此配合-7%止損規則可有效控制下行風險。
